# Dune (2021) — Reader demo transcript
Third-party film transcript (markdown export) from [Scraps from the Loft](https://scrapsfromtheloft.com/movies/dune-2021-transcript/); navigation links and page footer removed here.
Not an official screenplay; film © respective rights holders.

---
Dune is an epic science fiction film directed by Denis Villeneuve, who co-wrote the screenplay with Jon Spaihts and Eric Roth.
The film is based on the 1965 novel of the same name by Frank Herbert.

Genre: Science fiction, Action, Adventure
Release date: Dune was originally scheduled for a late 2020 release, but it was delayed due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
open_questions: Why did the Emperor choose this path?
And who will our next oppressors be?
[Paul] [sighs] Why do we have to go through all this when it’s already been decided?
action_items:
Genre: Science fiction, Action, Adventure
Release date: Dune was originally scheduled for a late 2020 release, but it was delayed due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
Plot: Paul Atreides, the young heir of the Atreides family, must embrace his destiny as the Kwisatz Haderach, a messianic figure prophesied to lead humanity to a new era.
